tasks.label: Start Dev Server
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM node.exe /T 2>nul; Start-Sleep 2; npm run dev

tasks.label: Kill Port 5000
tasks.command: taskkill /F /PID 22332; taskkill /F /IM node.exe; Start-Sleep 2; netstat -aon | findstr ':5000'; Write-Host '===PORT CHECK DONE==='

tasks.label: Diagnose Kill Port
tasks.command: Get-Process -Id 22332 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name,CPU; taskkill /F /PID 22332; taskkill /F /IM node.exe; Start-Sleep 3; netstat -aon | findstr ':5000'

tasks.label: Restart Dev Server
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM node.exe ; Start-Sleep 2 ; npm run dev

tasks.label: Dev Server (Google Auth)
tasks.command: Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; Start-Sleep 2 ; npm run dev
